title: [IT人入] bubble sort, selection sort 同 insertion sort 其實有咩大差別

replies.msg:

用開double sort

用嚟sort double may

Bubble sort 既real life application 係我既認知有兩個

1. Assuming 個list 係already sorted or nearly sorted
2. 某D application 要visually show 返sorting 既effect

replies.msg: Insertion sort 同 bubble sort best case 係一樣

insertion sort best case O(N)
所以實際implementation quick sort行得太深會轉用insertion

quote.msg: 有無原因
因為point 1 係best case scenario
Insertion sort 同 bubble sort best case 係一樣

replies.msg:
Bubble sort also interacts poorly with modern CPU hardware. It produces at least twice as many writes as insertion sort, twice as many cache misses, and asymptotically more branch mispredictions.[citation needed] Experiments by Astrachan sorting strings in Java show bubble sort to be roughly one-fifth as fast as an insertion sort and 70% as fast as a selection sort.[3]
from wiki

Selection best case o(n^2)
Insert 同bubble best case 係o(n)

而且雖然bubble 同insertion 個worse case 係一樣 ，但實際運行上insertion 會比bubble 快 ，因為insertion 個inner loop可以early stop （當i(2) < i(3)) ，但係bubble 就唔得

quote.msg: 有無原因

就算計best case scenario wiki寫兩者一樣...

replies.msg:
1. 因為quick sort真係好快 ，雖然兩個都係O(nlogn)，但係quick sort個constant一般黎講比較細，而喺實際implementation，constant係好撚重要的
2. heap sort個complete binary tree係完全可以好方便咁用array去做，當然比起bubble sort個d單純既nested loop會複雜d，但係data structure呢d野write once use everywhere無乜所謂啦

1. 因為quick sort真係好快 ，雖然兩個都係O(nlogn)，但係quick sort個constant一般黎講比較細，而喺實際implementation，constant係好撚重要的
2. heap sort個complete binary tree係完全可以好方便咁用array去做，當然比起bubble sort個d單純既nested loop會複雜d，但係data structure呢d野write once use everywhere無乜所謂啦

replies.msg:
其實搵到quicksort個conatant細啲 覺得自己鑽左牛角尖
自己諗左個例子但都唔太明
e.g. 要由細至大sort 4,3,2,1

Quicksort:
假設隨機用左3做base point
因為(4>3), (2<3), (1<3)
變成 2,1,"3",4 (3做完base point唔洗再郁)
呢個時候 因為4係單丁 所以4都唔洗郁
變成2,1,"3","4"
最後，隨機揀左1做base point
因為(2>1)
變成"1",2,"3","4"
2係單丁一個 唔洗郁
"1","2","3","4"
完成 總共compare左4次

Mergesort:
4-3-2-1
兩個兩個數merge
因為(3<4),(1<2)
變成3,4-1,2
最左嘅數先compare
因為(1<3),(2<3) //3,4唔洗再比較
變成1,2,3,4
完成 都係總共compare 4次

quote.msg: 因為merge sort costs space

replies.msg: 點解咁講

quote.msg: 因為merge sort costs space
點解咁講

replies.msg:
Costs space means costing memory. Merge sort 係non-in-space recursive sorting. 要用額外一個array黎store d elements, space complexity = O(n). 如果你玩過coding challenge就知基本上係無機會用merge sort, in large test case(says > 1million elements) 一定爆硬. Merge sort 有一個version係用linkedlist既 space complexity = O(log n).

但上面有講quick sort in general 係快過merge sort 好多. Quick sort 既worst case係好容易避免, 一開始簡多幾個pivot羅medium就得.

就算計best case scenario wiki寫兩者一樣...

1. 因為quick sort真係好快 ，雖然兩個都係O(nlogn)，但係quick sort個constant一般黎講比較細，而喺實際implementation，constant係好撚重要的
2. heap sort個complete binary tree係完全可以好方便咁用array去做，當然比起bubble sort個d單純既nested loop會複雜d，但係data structure呢d野write once use everywhere無乜所謂啦

其實搵到quicksort個conatant細啲 覺得自己鑽左牛角尖
自己諗左個例子但都唔太明
e.g. 要由細至大sort 4,3,2,1

Quicksort:
假設隨機用左3做base point
因為(4>3), (2<3), (1<3)
變成 2,1,"3",4 (3做完base point唔洗再郁)
呢個時候 因為4係單丁 所以4都唔洗郁
變成2,1,"3","4"
最後，隨機揀左1做base point
因為(2>1)
變成"1",2,"3","4"
2係單丁一個 唔洗郁
"1","2","3","4"
完成 總共compare左4次

Mergesort:
4-3-2-1
兩個兩個數merge
因為(3<4),(1<2)
變成3,4-1,2
最左嘅數先compare
因為(1<3),(2<3) //3,4唔洗再比較
變成1,2,3,4
完成 都係總共compare 4次

replies.msg: 所謂constant細d其實包括好多野例如cache miss, branch prediction呢類好難計既野，所以話constant細d其實都係實際profiling出黎

講下一個實際應用
呢啲sort係array size細個時好快 所以quick sort/merge去到n~6既leave case可以用呢三種sort去處理
具體用邊種 視乎返你個case邊種快啲 實際benchmark最好個隻就用個隻

quote.msg: 因為merge sort costs space
點解咁講

Costs space means costing memory. Merge sort 係non-in-space recursive sorting. 要用額外一個array黎store d elements, space complexity = O(n). 如果你玩過coding challenge就知基本上係無機會用merge sort, in large test case(says > 1million elements) 一定爆硬. Merge sort 有一個version係用linkedlist既 space complexity = O(log n).

但上面有講quick sort in general 係快過merge sort 好多. Quick sort 既worst case係好容易避免, 一開始簡多幾個pivot羅medium就得.

replies.msg: merge sort有inplace版本
btw in counting sort/timsort we truat

（然而timsort個standard implementation錯咗 ）

quote.msg: 因為merge sort costs space
點解咁講

Costs space means costing memory. Merge sort 係non-in-space recursive sorting. 要用額外一個array黎store d elements, space complexity = O(n). 如果你玩過coding challenge就知基本上係無機會用merge sort, in large test case(says > 1million elements) 一定爆硬. Merge sort 有一個version係用linkedlist既 space complexity = O(log n).

但上面有講quick sort in general 係快過merge sort 好多. Quick sort 既worst case係好容易避免, 一開始簡多幾個pivot羅medium就得.

replies.msg:
出黎做野係係達到最低要求既同時minimize coding effort 因為developer既人工貴過runtime cost
所以無特別要求既 就call library call interface最方便個個 就算係N^2 只要仲係接受範圍以內都照call

quote.msg: 你意思係n>6先用quick sort 其他用呢3個algo

有幾可n會<6
同埋都係個句，call lib啦
所有recursive sorting都會break到落n<6既case

replies.msg:
咁你又啱
不過6個用咩sort都無所謂啦

quote.msg:
有幾可n會<6
同埋都係個句，call lib啦
所有recursive sorting都會break到落n<6既case

咁你又啱
不過6個用咩sort都無所謂啦

replies.msg: 都唔係架 因為leave case為定左linear part既constant factor 然後n log n 個log n本身細 所以n個coefficient都顯着

quote.msg:
call lib識幫我nearly sorted轉用insertion咁
而且都要揀用邊隻 唔係逐隻test卦

c有qsort
c++有std::sort
java有Collections.sort
等等
各自用咗唔同sorting algo

補充一句就算同一個language，唔同lib既implementation都會唔同
e.g. gnu既stdlibc++同clang既libc++用既algo有些微差別

replies.msg: 其實你點知得咁仔細架 我用過唔少次java 嘅Collections.sort 都唔知實際用咩algo 交到貨就算
